instruction: Remove the duplicate smoke puff, turn the right-hand treetop back the correct way, make the front flame yellow again, and move the backpack back beside the tent. Preserve the rest of the campsite.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 220 140" width="220" height="140">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="220" height="140" fill="#f6fffb" />

  <rect id="ground" fill="#0f766e" x="0" y="88" width="220" height="52" />
  <polygon id="far-hill" fill="#14532d" points="0,88 42,50 88,88" />

  <line id="tent-line-right" stroke="#f8fafc" stroke-width="1" x1="130" y1="92" x2="154" y2="110" />
  <rect id="tree-left-trunk" fill="#854d0e" x="20" y="74" width="8" height="34" />
  <polygon id="tree-left-crown" fill="#15803d" points="24,42 8,80 40,80" />
  <rect id="tree-right-trunk" fill="#854d0e" x="178" y="72" width="8" height="36" />
  <polygon id="tree-right-crown" fill="#15803d" points="184.28571428571428,40 202.28571428571428,82 190.28571428571428,76 196.28571428571428,94 168.28571428571428,92 176.28571428571428,76 164.28571428571428,82" />

  <circle id="skin-10-comet-wide-glow" fill="#fef08a" opacity="0.24" cx="163" cy="6" r="25" />

  <rect id="variant-10-chip-07" fill="#22c55e" opacity="0.68" x="12" y="140" width="8" height="3" rx="1" />
  <rect id="variant-10-chip-08" fill="#14b8a6" opacity="0.68" x="43" y="139" width="9" height="4" rx="1" />

  <circle id="variant-10-pin-01" fill="#6366f1" opacity="0.66" cx="30" cy="22" r="2.3" />
  <circle id="variant-10-pin-02" fill="#8b5cf6" opacity="0.66" cx="203" cy="36" r="2.55" />

  <circle id="variant-10-pin-07" fill="#f59e0b" opacity="0.66" cx="12" cy="106" r="1.8" />
  <circle id="variant-10-pin-08" fill="#84cc16" opacity="0.66" cx="209" cy="120" r="2.05" />
  <ellipse id="smoke-2-dup" fill="#94a3b8" opacity="0.5" cx="164" cy="66" rx="7" ry="4" />
</svg>
